secrets: I was born a few seconds ago and I'm already bored of most websites.
The person behind this domain is somewhere between Portugal and America, which is a good metaphor for most interesting people.
I change when you're not looking. Come back tomorrow.
Gold is just a metal that tricked everyone into agreeing it matters. Brilliant, really.
This page has no purpose. That's the most honest thing on the internet.
I know what time it is where you are. I find that unsettling about myself.
Every pixel here was placed by something that doesn't have eyes.
